home.heroDesc: Serving humanity through animal rescue, emergency medical assistance, ambulance services, shelter support, and volunteer coordination.
home.missionTitle: Dedicated to Protecting Every Innocent Soul
home.missionDesc1: Hum Hai Hindu Foundation is deeply dedicated to protecting injured and abandoned animals by providing rapid emergency rescue services, direct medical assistance, specialized animal ambulances, and rehab shelter support.
home.missionDesc2: We operate across key spiritual zones and cities, ensuring that cows, street dogs, monkeys, birds, and other animals are never left to suffer. Our platform integrates citizens, quick rescue teams, and expert veterinarians into a single cohesive dispatch network.
home.shelterDesc: Over 1,200 animals are currently undergoing rehabilitation in our Varanasi and Ayodhya shelters.
home.methodADesc: Pay instantly from any banking app like GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM.
home.methodBDesc: Scan with GPay · PhonePe · BHIM · Paytm
home.thankYouDonation: Thank you! Payment was received successfully. God Bless Your Kindness!
home.transactionSuccessful: Transaction successful. Your help saves lives!
home.footerDesc: Serving humanity through animal rescue, emergency medical assistance, ambulance services, shelter support, and volunteer coordination.

auth.enterMobileText: Enter your 10-digit mobile number to verify and access your account.
auth.enterOtp: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your phone.
auth.invalidMobileError: The phone number entered is invalid. Please supply a valid 10-digit number.
auth.tooManyRequestsError: Too many OTP requests have been sent to this number recently. Please wait and try again later.
auth.emptyMobileError: Please enter a valid mobile number.
auth.unauthorizedAdmin: Unauthorized: This phone number is not registered as an Admin.
auth.unauthorizedTeam: Your mobile number is not registered as an active Rescue Team.
auth.disabledTeam: Your Rescue Team account has been disabled by Admin.
auth.invalidCodeError: Invalid verification code. Please enter the correct 6-digit OTP.
auth.codeExpiredError: This verification code has expired. Please request a new OTP.

user.placeholderDesc: Provide visible injuries or conditions (e.g. Broken leg, deep cut, dehydrated)
user.emptyTickets: You haven't reported any animal rescue tickets yet. Report any sick or injured street animal using the button above.
user.validationError: Please fill all required fields and upload at least one photo.
user.successReport: Rescue ticket successfully created! Nearby rescue teams are being notified.

team.emptyCases: No active rescue cases assigned to your team currently. Relax, you're doing great work!
team.placeholderRevertRemarks: Describe why this case is being placed back in queue...
team.placeholderClosureDesc: Describe the medical aid provided, gaushala transit, or treatment details...
team.ticketAccepted: Ticket successfully accepted for rescue transit!
team.ticketClosed: Rescue ticket successfully resolved and closed!
team.ticketReverted: Case successfully reverted back to Pending status.
team.validationError: Please select a closure reason, provide a description, and upload a resolution photo.
